project_context.name: Meal Planner App
project_context.aesthetic: The Editorial Cookbook — merging high-end food magazine layouts with frictionless, bento-style task management. Soft, grounded, and intimate.
key_features: Shared grocery checklist with live sync
Weekly meal planner grid (3 meals/day, 7 days)

fonts.headings: Cormorant Garamond (or system serif fallback if not loaded)
fonts.body: Manrope (or system sans-serif fallback if not loaded)

rules.anti_default: Never use default Roboto for Headings. Use the serif font to evoke the editorial cookbook feel.
rules.tracking: Use tight tracking on large headings, loose tracking on uppercase overlines/labels.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind-equivalent scale for React Native (4px base)

strategies.generous_spacing: Use p-6 (24px) or p-8 (32px) for screen containers. Give food imagery room to breathe.
strategies.bento_grid: For the weekly planner: Use horizontal FlatLists for days, vertical cards for meals. Avoid heavy card shadows; prefer subtle 1px borders and distinct surface colors.
strategies.cardless_lists: For the grocery list, do not put each item in a card. Use a continuous flat list with soft dividers and ample vertical padding (py-4).

buttons.primary: Solid background (Brand Primary #2C4C3B), text inverse, rounded-full (borderRadius: 9999), minHeight: 48px, generous horizontal padding. No default Android elevation shadow.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px border of #2C4C3B, text #2C4C3B, rounded-full.
buttons.accent_action: For 'Add to List' or 'Save Recipe': Use Accent color (#C8553D) to draw the eye.

cards.recipe_card: Minimalist. Image takes up 60% of height, sharp or slightly rounded corners (max 8px). Title in serif below the image. No shadow, just a subtle border (#E5E0D8).
cards.meal_slot: Surface background (#F4F0E6), dashed or solid 1px border. If empty, center an icon with muted text.

inputs.text_field: Solid background (#F4F0E6), no border by default, 1px Primary border on focus. Large text size for easy typing in the kitchen.
inputs.tags: Pill-shaped (borderRadius: 9999), bg: #EAE5D9, text: #2C4C3B. Compact padding (px-3 py-1).
inputs.checkbox: Circular checkbox. When checked: solid #C8553D background with white checkmark. When unchecked: 1px border #C8553D. Checked items get text strikethrough and opacity 50%.

navigation.bottom_tab: Solid elevated background (#FFFFFF), border-top 1px (#E5E0D8). Active icon uses #C8553D, inactive uses #8A847B. Clean, label-less icons preferred if intuitive.

ingredient_highlighting.style: When text contains an ingredient, apply font-weight bold and color #2C4C3B, perhaps a very subtle #EAE5D9 background behind the specific word.

media.strategy: Use high-quality, editorial flat-lay imagery to inspire cooking. Abstract/soft shapes for empty states.

assets.description: Minimalist editorial flat lay of fresh cooking ingredients on a warm sandstone counter. Use behind the login/auth screen with a 40% dark overlay or glassmorphism panel.
Minimalist 3D grocery bag. Use on the grocery tab when the list is completely empty.
Editorial plated dinner. Use as a fallback thumbnail if a YouTube/Instagram link fails to fetch an image thumbnail.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react-native for consistent, clean SVG icons with 1.5px stroke width. (e.g., Home, Calendar, ShoppingBag, Plus, Bookmark).

motion_and_interactions.gestures: Support swipe-to-delete on grocery list items. Provide haptic feedback (ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light) when checking off groceries or dropping a recipe into a meal slot.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use soft, natural easing for modal and screen transitions. Avoid harsh pop-ins.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Buttons must show opacity reduction (activeOpacity={0.7}) on press.

accessibility.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet 4.5:1. Primary text on surface exceeds 10:1.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all interactive elements (especially checkboxes in the grocery list!).
accessibility.test_ids: Apply 'testID' (React Native equivalent to data-testid) to all interactive elements, e.g., testID='login-button', testID='grocery-item-checkbox', testID='recipe-card'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React Native (Expo) app for Android.
Set up Firebase Auth and Firestore for real-time syncing of the shared grocery list and meal plans.
Use standard StyleSheet.create or a styling library (like NativeWind if permitted, but stick strictly to the color/spacing values provided here).
For the Planner: Create a view with 7 days (horizontal scroll/tabs) and 3 vertical sections per day (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner).
For recipes: Create an input to paste URLs (IG, YT, FB) and display them as cards using the fallback image if thumbnail scraping is complex.
For grocery list: Build a robust, real-time checklist using Circular Checkboxes and Strikethrough styles.
Never use plain Roboto for prominent typography; integrate Cormorant Garamond (or another serif) via expo-font for the 'Cookbook' feel.
